title.en: Clinical investigation of medical devices for human subjects - Good clinical practice
title.zh: 医疗器械临床调查 - 良好临床实践

standards.abstract: Addresses good clinical practice for clinical investigations of medical devices in human subjects.
standards.scope: Clinical investigation of medical devices for human subjects -- Good clinical practice.

title.en: In vitro diagnostic medical devices - Clinical performance studies using specimens from human subjects - Good study practice
title.zh: 体外诊断医疗器械 - 用于近患者检测（POCT）的临床性能研究

standards.abstract: Specifies requirements for clinical performance studies of in vitro diagnostic medical devices using specimens from human subjects.
standards.scope: In vitro diagnostic medical devices -- Clinical performance studies using specimens from human subjects -- Good study practice.

title.en: Clinical investigation of medical devices for human subjects - Good clinical practice - Amendment 2
title.zh: 人体医疗器械临床研究 - 良好临床实践 - 修正案2

standards.abstract: Amendment 2 to ISO 14155:2020, providing further clarifications and updates to the clinical investigation standard. Published 2025.
standards.scope: Second amendment to the clinical investigation GCP standard.

title.en: Medical device software - Part 1: Guidance on the application of ISO 14971 to medical device software
title.zh: 医疗器械软件 - 第1部分：ISO 14971应用于医疗器械软件的指南

standards.abstract: Provides guidance on applying ISO 14971 risk management to medical device software development. Confirmed 2020.
standards.scope: Risk management guidance specific to medical device software.
standards.note: Supports clinical investigation planning for software as medical device (SaMD).

title.en: Usability of consumer products and products for public use - Part 1: Design requirements
title.zh: 消费品和公共用途产品的可用性 - 第1部分：设计要求

standards.abstract: Specifies requirements and recommendations for the usability of consumer products, applicable to home-use medical devices in clinical investigation setting.
standards.scope: Usability design requirements applicable to home-use medical device clinical studies.
